chunk_a.description: Presses the A button 3 times. Useful for safely chunking through early-game battles or text without risking over-pressing and missing important HP updates.

history.commit_message: Removed autopress_buttons from input_schema as per system instructions.

heal_pokemon_center.description: Talks to Nurse Joy from (3,3) facing Up to heal the party.

history.commit_message: Fixed script to print a JSON array of button strings instead of returning a Python list.

pace_route2_grass.description: Automates pacing up and down the tall grass on Route 2 along the X=4 column to trigger wild encounters.

pace_route3_grass.description: Automates pacing left and right in a 6-tile wide grass patch to trigger wild encounters. Outputs 50 alternating Right/Left presses (5 right, 5 left).
